component.name: grawji
component.summary: Develop Fujifilm RAFs through the real camera engine

description.p: grawji is a GTK4 frontend for rawji. It develops Fujifilm RAF files on Linux using the camera's own conversion engine over USB, so the result is identical to Fujifilm X RAW Studio: authentic film simulations and recipes, rendered by the body itself.

ul.li: Live preview through the camera's own conversion engine
Full recipe control: film simulation, white balance, dynamic range, tone, colour, sharpness, grain and noise reduction
Save, apply and import/export recipes in X RAW Studio's FP format
Single and full-folder batch export at full resolution

screenshot.caption: Tuning a recipe with a live preview from the camera
